top_signals.title: Shein Is Said to Target Up to $3 Billion Hong Kong IPO by August
top_signals.summary: Shein Global Holdings Ltd. is seeking to list in Hong Kong as soon as in August after securing approval from China’s securities regulator, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saylor’s Strategy Raises Reserve to $3 Billion With Stock Sale
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. raised about $467 million through the sale of common stock, lifting its cash reserve to roughly $3 billion while refraining from buying or selling Bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
